summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/05/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 1.91% today, the main contract closed at 736. The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are not active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is general.
